name: Gasping Lament
description:
This collar is a silken cord from which hangs a small silver amulet that bears the likeness of a woman with her hand at her throat. A gasping lament is a powerful coda instrument that's worn rather than held. While you sing, you gain a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks to and to Performance checks.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the collar to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip
  • 1st ,
  • 2nd ,
  • 3rd ,
  • 4th ,
  • 5th ,

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
